pages.zh: 古时候有个小男孩叫孔融，家里有很多兄弟。
pages.en: Long ago a little boy named Kong Rong had many brothers.

pages.zh: 分梨的时候，他主动挑了最小的一个。
pages.en: When sharing pears, he chose the smallest one for himself.

pages.zh: 大人问为什么，他说：「我年纪小，应该让哥哥们。」
pages.en: Asked why, he said, "I am younger, so my brothers should have the big ones."

pages.zh: 孔融让梨的故事，教我们要懂得谦让和分享。
pages.en: Kong Rong's story teaches us to be humble and to share.

pages.zh: 小朋友们在院子里玩，一个孩子掉进了大水缸。
pages.en: Children were playing in a yard when one fell into a huge water vat.

pages.zh: 大家都吓坏了，不知道怎么办。
pages.en: Everyone was frightened and did not know what to do.

pages.zh: 聪明的司马光搬起一块石头，砸破了水缸。
pages.en: Clever Sima Guang lifted a stone and smashed the vat open.

pages.zh: 水流出来，孩子得救了。遇事要冷静动脑筋。
pages.en: The water rushed out and the child was saved. Stay calm and think!
